name: Cherry Divinity
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugar, corn syrup, and water in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil and continue boiling until it reaches the hard ball stage.
3. Remove from heat and beat in the egg whites.
4. Stir in the cherry jello until well combined.
5. Slowly pour the hot syrup over the mixture while stirring constantly.
6. Mix thoroughly and fold in the chopped nuts and coconut.
7. Pour the batter into a buttered pan and cut into squares when cool.
